hero.subtitle: Kurikirana ubuziranenge bw'umwuka, menya uturere dufite pollen nyinshi, kandi ubone amatangazo y'ubuzima ako kanya akomoka ku makuru y'ibidukikije na AI.

prevention.title: Inama zo kwirinda Asthma
prevention.subtitle: Intambwe z'ingenzi zo kwirinda no gucunga neza ibibazo by'ubuhumekero.

breathe.title: Guma utuje & Humeka buhoro
breathe.description: Iteke wicaye neza, humeka buhoro kandi gerageza kuba utuje mu gihe cy'ikibazo.

inhaler.title: Koresha Inhaler yawe
inhaler.description: Kurikirana uburyo bwawe bwo gukoresha inhaler. Fata imiti yihutirwa nk'uko bikwiye.

avoid.title: Irinde Ibiteza Ibibazo
avoid.description: Hagarara kure y'umwotsi, ivu, pollen cyangwa impumuro zikaze zishobora gukoma mu nkokora.

seekHelp.title: Shaka Ubufasha Niba Bikenewe
seekHelp.description: Hamamagara muganga cyangwa serivisi z'ubutabazi niba ibimenyetso bikomeje cyangwa byiyongera.

feature.monitoring: Gukurikirana mu gihe nyacyo - Kurikirana uko uhumeka n'ibimenyetso byawe
feature.aiRisk: Isesengura ry'Ibibazo na AI - Baza ibyago byihariye kuri wowe
feature.alerts: Amatangazo y'Ibidukikije - Menya uko ubuziranenge bw'umwuka buhagaze aho utuye

newsletter.subscribed: Wiyandikishije {{email}} mu makuru mashya ya AsthmaShield!

cta.title: Witeguye kwirinda ubuzima bwawe?
cta.subtitle: Jiye mu bagenzi batandukanyije bo mu Rwanda bakoresha AsthmaShield gukurikirana ubuziranenge bw'umwuka no kwirinda ibibazo by'ubuhumekero.

footer.tagline: Kurinda ibigongo bya Rwanda bikoresheje ubwenge bw'ibikurikirana ibidukikije.
footer.copyright: © 2024 Asthma Shield Rwanda. Buri buryo buhirwa.

login.title: Injira
login.subtitle: Injira kugira ngo ukomeze kurinda ubuzima bwawe

register.subtitle: Fungura konti yawe kugira ngo utangire kurinda ubuzima bwawe
register.errorPassword: Ijambo ribanza rigomba kuba rigizwe nibura ibimenyetso 6

landing.title: Ibibogo Byanyu Bikurikirwa,
landing.subtitle: Asthma Shield ikoresha ubwenge bw'ubukorano n'ibitekerezo by'ibanze kugira ngo ikurengeze ibipimo by'impumuro mbi mu Rwanda.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Ikoranwa hashingiwe kugira ngo ribe rwifashishije amakuru y'ibikiyage n'ubwenge bw'ubukorano bw'isi.
landing.climateTrackingDesc: Ibicuruzwa byo mu kirere, ubukana, n'ibitekerezo by'umwuka ukomoka mu miterere yose y'u Rwanda.
landing.aiDoctorDesc: Ibiganiro kuri video n'ijwi mu masaha 24/7 n'umudamu wisanzuye wize mu bikenye bw'ubuzima.
landing.riskAlertsDesc: Ubutumwa bugendanwa igihe ikigero cy'umwuka mubi cyangwa ibyaryo mu karere kanyu kigera hejuru.

map.title: Ikarita y'Ubuziranenge bw'Umwuka mu Rwanda
map.subtitle: Reba ubuziranenge bw'umwuka n'ibipimo bya pollen mu karere kose mu gihe nyacyo
map.selectDistrict: Hitamo akarere kugira ngo ubone ibisobanuro
map.noData: Nta makuru ahari kuri aka karere
